title: Implement RPC protocol v2
description: Redesign the RPC protocol to support streaming responses, batch operations, and binary payloads. This will improve extension performance and enable new features like live tailing and bulk mutations.

title: Design streaming response format
description: Define the wire format for streaming RPC responses. Should support chunked JSON, progress updates, and cancellation signals.

title: Fix socket buffer overflow on large responses
description: When listing >500 issues with full hydration, the response exceeds the 64KB socket buffer and gets truncated. Need chunked writes or dynamic buffer sizing.
close_reason: Fixed in commit 14b9ab2 with chunked write support

title: Add batch operation support
description: Allow multiple mutations in a single RPC call with transactional semantics. Needed for bulk imports and multi-issue updates from the extension.

title: Update VSCode extension for v2 protocol
description: Migrate the extension RPC client to use the new v2 protocol. Must maintain backwards compatibility during rollout.

title: Write protocol v2 integration tests
description: End-to-end tests covering streaming, batching, cancellation, and error handling for the new protocol.

title: Binary payload encoding
description: Support binary payloads for file attachments and large content fields. Use length-prefixed framing over the unix socket.
